exact_prompt.text: FINAL EXACT PROTOCOL REVIEW. Read-only. Repo `/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack`. Review the complete current `round_13_protocol` object whose required SHA-256 is `b53bc2692fc65f478301597756217a097bb2b2627a74c4c3ef5cd82ef1684a76`, from plan `docs/evidence/adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-design/append-authorization-plan.json`, plus identical object in dossier, design note, corrected ADR/current-state/roadmap/P2b1 status text. Independently recompute protocol hash and assess the WHOLE protocol, not only a delta: same-OFD `/usr/bin/flock -xn 3`, retained bwrap/verified-FD confinement, deterministic repo staging, C0a/C0b/C1/Ccommit, bootstrap vs recovery authorization, target-first S0-S4, terminal COMPLETE/INCOMPLETE precedence, observation-bounded claims, real production ZFS/no-fallback Stage2, exact 8 Stage2 paths and 3 Stage3 repo paths, frozen tuple, no current implementation/append authority. Also verify status docs now state Round6 historical milestone vs Round13 six isolated contexts from only Anthropic/OpenAI and no Round13 participation claim for DeepSeek/MiniMax/Moonshot/Z.ai. Return verdict SIGN/REVISE/BLOCK and concise exact claims. State whether any strictly better in-scope protocol remains. Do not write.

exact_returned_output.text:
**VERDICT: SIGN**

No blocking or revision finding. No strictly better in-scope protocol remains.

- Independently recomputed `SHA-256(RFC8785-JCS(round_13_protocol))` as `b53bc2692fc65f478301597756217a097bb2b2627a74c4c3ef5cd82ef1684a76`.
- The complete protocol objects in the [plan](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/evidence/adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-design/append-authorization-plan.json:1) and [dossier](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/evidence/2026-07-14-adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-read-only-preview-dossier.json:1) are identical.
- Plan raw/self hashes recompute to `7dfded…89d4f` / `f97b35…e33cc`; dossier raw/self hashes recompute to `487c50…26fad` / `5b3052…213d`.
- All eight machine artifacts are exact JCS+LF and self-valid. All six reviews bind the required protocol hash, are `SIGN`, and record no strictly better in-scope solution.
- The protocol correctly specifies retained verified-FD/bwrap confinement; same-OFD locking through pinned `/usr/bin/flock -xn 3`; immediate BUSY with no protected checks; deterministic dirfd-relative repository staging; no-replace hardlinks and fsync recovery; bootstrap C0a/C0b/C1/Ccommit versus append-only-chain recovery authorization; target-first S0-S4 classification; mutually exclusive terminal `COMPLETE`/`target_durable_evidence_incomplete` precedence; and observation-bounded claims.
- Stage 2 requires real production data on the real production ZFS filesystem, with no substitute, fixture, reduced proof, or fallback. The current `.abrain` and repository evidence filesystems report ZFS, but no Stage 2 acceptance is claimed or authorized.

Exact Stage 2 create-only paths are:

```text
extensions/_shared/proposition-real-policy-append-writer.ts
extensions/_shared/proposition-real-policy-append-transcript.ts
extensions/_shared/proposition-real-policy-append-production-preview.ts
extensions/_shared/proposition-real-policy-append-production-execute.ts
scripts/dossier-proposition-real-policy-append-production-preview.mjs
scripts/execute-proposition-real-policy-append-evidence.mjs
scripts/smoke-proposition-real-policy-append.mjs
docs/evidence/2026-07-14-adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-execution-ready-preview-dossier.json
```

Exact Stage 3 repository outputs are:

```text
docs/evidence/2026-07-14-adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-production-ratification-record.json
docs/evidence/adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-execution-intent-1c8cc5d23110f44a.json
docs/evidence/2026-07-14-adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-production-post-execute-dossier.json
```

The frozen envelope independently recomputes to 1,868 bytes, raw SHA-256 `0fe6ded4012423cbebcf618341d68a57a459dd010e2fa56f6ced0a1a311eeb2e`, and body/event ID `1c8cc5d23110f44affb574598e65027ac350373b86c651c4ed1354ad171685a6`. The `8c` shard, target, all eight Stage 2 paths, and all three Stage 3 paths are currently absent.

The [design note](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/notes/2026-07-14-adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-design.md:10), corrected [ADR](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/adr/0040-unified-proposition-evidence-model.md:12), [current state](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/current-state.md:71), [roadmap](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/roadmap.md:78), and [P2b.1 status](/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack/docs/notes/2026-07-14-adr0040-p2b1-stable-view-design.md:63) correctly distinguish Round 6 as the historical six-vendor milestone from Round 13’s six isolated contexts: three Anthropic and three OpenAI. They make no Round 13 participation claim for DeepSeek, MiniMax, Moonshot AI, or Z.ai.

Current authority remains design-only. Stage 2 implementation, Stage 3 append, `.abrain` mutation, P2a CAS advance, P2b publication/selection, runtime work, restart, commit, and push are not authorized.
